output: T6 is complete. Same-shot semantics are now centralized in one backend helper, `resolveSelectedClipShot()`, which prefers explicit `shot_id`, then pinned-shot-group membership for selected timeline clips, then generation-history fallback. `runAgentLoop()`, `executeCreateTask()`, `executeSetLora()`, and `executeDuplicateGeneration()` now all use that resolver, `duplicate_generation` keeps the explicit-shot fast path, and prompt text now surfaces structured selected-clip and shared-shot context to the model. The targeted edge Vitest modules passed, and the batch checkpoint was written.

task_updates.executor_notes: Added one shared resolver in `tools/clips.ts` that resolves shot context in priority order: explicit `shot_id`, then pinned-shot-group membership for selected timeline clips, then `findShotForGenerations()` fallback. `runAgentLoop()`, `executeCreateTask()`, `executeSetLora()`, and `executeDuplicateGeneration()` now all use that helper, and `duplicate_generation` keeps the fast path because explicit shared `shot_id` returns before any generation-history lookup. Prompt text now surfaces structured selected-clip shot metadata and shared-shot context to the model. Verified with the full `tools/clips.test.ts`, `tools/create-task.test.ts`, and `loop.test.ts` modules.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. `runAgentLoop()`, `executeCreateTask()`, `executeSetLora()`, and `executeDuplicateGeneration()` now all resolve shot context through the shared `resolveSelectedClipShot()` helper, which prefers explicit `shot_id`, then pinned-shot-group membership, then generation-history fallback.
